title: Pentacalia barkleyana
taxonomy: Pentacalia barkleyana is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a member of the genus Pentacalia, which includes a variety of plant species native to Central and South America. The classification of Pentacalia barkleyana places it within the subtribe Eupatoriinae, a group of plants characterized by their composite flower heads. This species is also known to be a part of the tribe Senecioneae. Further classification includes its placement in the order Asterales.
